evidence: "Well documented research. Keeps to the point."
"The flashing back and forth between the time periods was very effective."
"Some interesting paradoxes touched upon but not well defined or well developed."
"Interesting but overly simplified presentation. Feeds the imagination more than the intellect."
"The two very traumatic events were not convincing due to the haste needed to get everything in a short movie."
"Bad story line, bad special effects, bad acting."
"I enjoy Star Trek. This movie did not disappoint."
"Fascinating presentation of Brian Wilson's slide into mental illness..."
"This was a very interesting self narrative of this racing driver's career..."

summary: The user shows a strong preference for documentaries and historical narratives, appreciating complex storytelling and high production quality. They have a notable loyalty to the Star Trek franchise and value emotional resonance in their viewing experiences.
